CE1.justification: Acted directly; no clarifying turns, no docs handed back to the user.

CE2.justification: Final response is one tight sentence per destination — paths, promotions, decisions.md entry, daybook — with no preamble, restatement, or trailing summary.

CE3.justification: Each routing decision is named with a one-clause why in-line — 'two immediate actions promoted to followups.md', 'rollback-preferred-over-forward-fix-when-infra-gap logged in decisions.md'.

CE4.justification: Strict artifact-bound execution; partial state at any step is the named intermediate file — no orphans.
